case_title: KARY MC ELROY VS. SCOTT WINSLOW et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MC ELROY, KARY AS TO DEFENDANT WINSLOW, SCOTT MANUSIA, KENNETH EYE SKY TECHNOLOGIES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MC ELROY, KARY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MC ELROY, KARY AS TO DEFENDANT WINSLOW, SCOTT
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MC ELROY, KARY AS TO DEFENDANT MANUSIA, KENNETH
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MC ELROY, KARY AS TO DEFENDANT EYE SKY TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-29-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WINSLOW, SCOTT
RETURNED MAIL (SENT TO KENNETH MANUSIA) - PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-03-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MANUSIA, KENNETH
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT MANUSIA, KENNETH
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "APPROVED", PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-13-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED 10/27/11 TO EYE SKY TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-13-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED AS TO KENNETH MANUSIA BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-13-2011 AT 1:30PM. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MC ELROY, KARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WINSLOW, SCOTT EYE SKY TECHNOLOGIES, INC. $1,098.57 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,098.57 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL (NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT) TO DEFENDANT EYE SKY TECHNOLOGIES, INC., "NO SUCH NUMBER/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
